---
title: "Collaborations"
---

Research is a collaborative effort. This page highlights the researchers, institutions, and scientific communities with whom I share or have shared research interests and projects.

The collaboration profiles are currently being prepared. They will include each collaborator's institution, our shared research area, and a link to their professional or institutional profile.

<!--
Suggested structure for each entry:

### Name

**Institution:** Institution name  
**Shared research areas:** Research topics  
**Collaboration:** Brief description of the joint work  
**Profile:** [Institutional profile](https://example.com)

Possible future sections:

## Current collaborations

## Previous collaborations

## Research groups and scientific communities
-->
